# API Reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Pipeline data container

The hierarchical data container passed between processing steps

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [xData](xData.qmd#xileh.core.pipelinedata.xData) | The generalized pipeline data container |
| [from_dict](from_dict.qmd#xileh.core.pipelinedata.from_dict) | Given a dictionary representation of an xData object |
| [from_container](from_container.qmd#xileh.core.pipelinedata.from_container) | Load a container located at cpath |

## Pipeline

Composable pipelines operating on xData containers

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [xPipeline](xPipeline.qmd#xileh.core.pipeline.xPipeline) | The pipeline as a individual realization of |

## Progress bars

Rich-backed progress bar wrapper

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [tqdm](tqdm.qmd#xileh.utils.progress.tqdm) | tqdm wrapper with a ``show_bar`` kwarg and DISABLE_PROGRESS_BAR env var support. |
